topic: A close-up of a 'Vinyl Record Player' being started.
raw_generation:
{
  "script": "INT. LIVING ROOM - CLOSE-UP OF A VINYL RECORD PLAYER. Warm light catches the gloss of the acrylic and metal; the record lies flat on the platter.
Action: A hand moves into frame, reaching for the start/Power switch; the switch is flipped; a soft motor whirr begins as the platter gradually spins.
The tonearm glides, pauses, then settles as the record spins; we follow the motion with a slow, precise dolly.
The tonearm lifts and glides toward the edge of the record; with a careful drop, the stylus sinks into the groove.
Crackle fades to music as the camera tightens on the grooves; the label comes into view and then the frame centers on the spinning platter.
Cut to a close-up of the needle in motion; hold on the spinning record until the first beat.
Fade to final frame: the platter turning, the music starting, the room silent except for the groove of sound.",
  "narration": "In this close-up, a vinyl record player wakes from stillness. The power switch clicks, the platter begins to spin, and a quiet motor hum fills the room. The tonearm lifts, glides to the record’s edge, and the needle drops with a soft crackle that announces the song. Light catches the grooves as the music begins to breathe, each revolution revealing more detail in the vinyl. The camera lingers on the spinning platter, letting the viewer feel the ritual of starting a record."
}

parsed_generation.script:
INT. LIVING ROOM - CLOSE-UP OF A VINYL RECORD PLAYER. Warm light catches the gloss of the acrylic and metal; the record lies flat on the platter.
Action: A hand moves into frame, reaching for the start/Power switch; the switch is flipped; a soft motor whirr begins as the platter gradually spins.
The tonearm glides, pauses, then settles as the record spins; we follow the motion with a slow, precise dolly.
The tonearm lifts and glides toward the edge of the record; with a careful drop, the stylus sinks into the groove.
Crackle fades to music as the camera tightens on the grooves; the label comes into view and then the frame centers on the spinning platter.
Cut to a close-up of the needle in motion; hold on the spinning record until the first beat.
Fade to final frame: the platter turning, the music starting, the room silent except for the groove of sound.
parsed_generation.narration: In this close-up, a vinyl record player wakes from stillness. The power switch clicks, the platter begins to spin, and a quiet motor hum fills the room. The tonearm lifts, glides to the record’s edge, and the needle drops with a soft crackle that announces the song. Light catches the grooves as the music begins to breathe, each revolution revealing more detail in the vinyl. The camera lingers on the spinning platter, letting the viewer feel the ritual of starting a record.

feedback: The sequence stays squarely on a vinyl player waking up, with clear close-ups of the switch, platter, tonearm, and needle. The narration adds mood and context beyond the visuals, but could be tighter to an action-first prompt style. Consider sharpening camera cues and keeping the narration concise to align with the reference prompts.
strengths: Clear close-up focus on the record player
Logical, action-driven progression from power to playback
fixes: Tighten narration to be more action-first and reduce lyrical commentary
Reinforce a single subject by minimizing background/extra actions
Make camera directions crisper (e.g., 'CUT TO' or 'DOLLY IN') to match reference style
